# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

# kong.yml

services:
  - name: user-service
    host: user-service.example.com
    port: 80

  - name: order-service
    host: order-service.example.com
    port: 80

routes:
  - name: user-routes
    protocols:
      - http
      - https
    paths:
      - /users/*
    service: user-service
    upstream_path: /api/v1/users

  - name: order-routes
    protocols:
      - http
      - https
    paths:
      - /orders/*
    service: order-service
    upstream_path: /api/v1/orders

upstreams:
  - name: user-upstream
    target: user-service.example.com
    targets:
      - host: user-service.example.com
        port: 80

  - name: order-upstream
    target: order-service.example.com
    targets:
      - host: order-service.example.com
        port: 80

routes:
  - name: user-routes
    protocols:
      - http
      - https
    paths:
      - /users/*
    service: user-service
    upstream_path: /api/v1/users

  - name: order-routes
    protocols:
      - http
      - https
    paths:
      - /orders/*
    service: order-service
    upstream_path: /api/v1/orders
